hyperedges.label: V1->V2 Migration Pipeline (harvest + transform + validate + load + check)
Metric Platform (metric docs + hooks + chip definitions + workspace prefs)

Core Firestore Collections (customers, userExtras, assessmentTemplates, assessmentSubmissions)
Functions Core Layer (admin, auth, http, env, dates, budgetTotals, bulkWriter, index)
Leaf Refactor Triad (header + prompt share Phase 1/2/3 workflow)
Non-Negotiable Spine Rules Set
Proposed New Collections (referrals, assessments, buckets)
Emulator Seeded Collections
Customers Feature Modal Tabs
Contracts Alignment Loop (types-into-contracts)
Spine Audit Deliverables (functions appendix + schema map + patch list)
